description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a tan fence, featuring a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior walls are primarily white, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The property includes a small yard with several trees and shrubs, as well as a paved driveway leading to a gated carport that accommodates two vehicles. The main entryway is accessible from the driveway and is marked by a simple door with adjacent windows, lacking ornate features or a porch. The backyard area appears to have a patio with outdoor furniture, providing a private outdoor space. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white facade, large windows, and tan fence with trees partially obscuring the house.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the driveway, carport with two cars, main entryway, and patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the carport, backyard patio, and more of the window arrangement on the back wall.
description_view_3: Side view displays the length of the house, additional windows, and the fenced yard with visible trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door adjacent to windows, no porch or decorative elements, accessed via driveway and gated entry
